name: Undue Hardship Deficiency Extension

eligibility.description: Taxpayers facing a deficiency in income, gift, or certain excise taxes where immediate payment causes significant financial hardship; not available for deficiencies due to negligence or fraud.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Taxpayers may extend the payment of a tax deficiency for up to 18 months (and potentially an additional 12 months) if they can demonstrate that payment would result in undue hardship.
